# tests/fixtures/bypass-record/record-complete-with-ticket.txt
#
# A complete bypass record under policy-extra-field.yml's
# must_record: [actor, reason, ticket] — all three fields present and
# non-empty. Pairs with record-complete.txt (which lacks 'ticket') to prove
# check-bypass-record.sh's required-field set tracks whatever policy
# declares, not a hardcoded pair.

actor: bob
reason: expired TLS cert blocking the security scanner; renewal in flight
ticket: OPS-4821
